preview.title: Agent Traffic Report: 23% of News Site Visits Now From AI
preview.abstract: Analysis of 500M page views across 200 publishers reveals AI agent traffic grew from 8% to 23% in 6 months. Top finding: agents that pay via x402 have 3x higher content completion rates than scrapers. Includes publisher revenue impact modeling.

preview.title: Publisher Revenue Deep Dive: The Micropayment Opportunity
preview.abstract: Detailed financial modeling of micropayment revenue streams for publishers. Compares ad revenue ($2-8 CPM), subscriptions ($10-30/mo), and x402 micropayments ($0.003-0.01/article). Includes break-even analysis and 3-year projections.

preview.title: Streaming Wars Q2 2026: Platform Consolidation Accelerates
preview.abstract: Three major mergers reshape the streaming landscape. Analysis of subscriber migration patterns and content licensing implications for media companies.
